generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired intelligence analyst with 30 years of experience, I've seen firsthand how critical strategic autonomy is for our national security. The current administration's approach is putting us at risk by relying too much on foreign allies. We need to invest in our own capabilities to ensure we're not caught off guard. The recent cyber attacks on our infrastructure show just how vulnerable we are. It's time to prioritize our own defense and reduce our dependence on others. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
